briefdescription.para: IPI response buffer indices for algorithm info query.

detaileddescription.para: Response buffer index for algorithm version

briefdescription.para: Response buffer index for NIST compliance status.
This file contains the xsecure API IDs for versal.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.0 bm 07/06/22 Initial release kpt 07/24/22 Added XSECURE_API_KAT and additional KAT ids dc 08/26/22 Removed gaps between the API IDs 5.1 skg 12/16/22 Added IPI commands for Encrypt/Decrypt Init,update,Final 5.7 tbk 04/16/26 Added IPI response buffer indices for algorithm info
